title: Driver assistance apparatus and vehicle having the same
abstract: A driver assistance apparatus according to an embodiment of the present invention includes: a first camera configured to capture a first video of the vicinity of a vehicle; a second camera configured to capture a second video of the vicinity of the vehicle; a processor configured to extract a first edge of an object included in a first stitching region in which the first video and the second video of the vicinity of the vehicle are connected; and a display unit configured to overlap and display the first edge and a synthetic video of the first and second videos of the vicinity of the vehicle except for the first stitching region, wherein the first stitching region is a fixed region included in the first video and the second video of the vicinity of the vehicle.
claims: Claims ( 10 ) A driver assistance apparatus comprising: a first camera configured to capture a first video of the vicinity of a vehicle; a second camera configured to capture a second video of the vicinity of the vehicle; a processor configured to extract a first edge of an object included in a first stitching region in which the first video of the vicinity of the vehicle and the second video of the vicinity of the vehicle are connected; and a display unit configured to overlap and display the first edge and a synthetic video of the first and second videos of the vicinity of the vehicle except for the first stitching region, wherein the first stitching region is a fixed region included in the first video and the second video of the vicinity of the vehicle. The driver assistance apparatus of claim 1, further comprising a third camera configured to capture a third video of the vicinity of the vehicle, wherein the processor extracts a second edge of an object included in a second stitching region in which the second video of the vicinity of the vehicle and the third video of the vicinity of the vehicle are connected, the display unit overlaps and displays the first and second edges and a synthetic video of the first to third videos of the vicinity of the vehicle except for the first stitching region and the second stitching region, and the second stitching region is a fixed region included in the second video and the third video of the vicinity of the vehicle. The driver assistance apparatus of claim 2, wherein the processor calculates a speed of the objects included in the first stitching region and the second stitching region and a distance between each of the objects and the vehicle. The driver assistance apparatus of claim 3, wherein the display unit further displays a top-view video of the vicinity of the vehicle viewed from above by using the calculated speed and the calculated distance. The driver assistance apparatus of claim 4, wherein the processor senses a specific object included in the first to third videos of the vicinity of the vehicle, the display unit further displays a message indicating that the specific object is sensed, and the specific object comprises at least one of a car, a motorcycle, a bicycle, and a human. The driver assistance apparatus of claim 4, wherein the processor senses a lane change operation of the vehicle, and when the lane change operation is sensed, the display unit further displays a lane change guide message based on the distance between the vehicle and each of the objects and the speed of the objects. The driver assistance apparatus of claim 6, wherein the processor senses the lane change operation of the vehicle through a movement of a wheel of the vehicle. The driver assistance apparatus of claim 6, wherein the processor senses the lane change operation of the vehicle through a movement of a vehicle icon included in the top-view video. The driver assistance apparatus of claim 6, wherein the display unit displays the lane change guide message based on a speed of an object located on a lane into which the vehicle is to switch, and a distance between the vehicle and the object. The driver assistance apparatus of claim 2, wherein the first camera is a camera located at a front right side of the vehicle, the second camera is a camera located at a rear center of the vehicle, and the third camera is a camera located at a front left side of the vehicle.
